source_pr.title: store/helper: use random server port in test
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Fixes #14986

### What is changed and how it works?

Use random server port
### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

symptoms: PR body: use random server port for the test instead of fixed 127.0.0.1:10100.
failure_signature: PR body: use random server port for the test instead of fixed 127.0.0.1:10100.
root_cause_explanation: The test started an HTTP server on a fixed port (127.0.0.1:10100), which can intermittently fail when the port is already in use (e.g., parallel tests or other processes). This PR switches to using a random/ephemeral port via httptest.NewServer and uses the returned URL, avoiding port conflicts.
fix_pattern: Use httptest.NewServer (random/ephemeral port) instead of binding to a fixed host:port in tests.

evidence: evidence: PR body: use random server port for the test instead of fixed 127.0.0.1:10100.
evidence: diff replaces fixed-port http.Server with `httptest.NewServer` and uses returned URL to avoid port collision (store/helper/helper_test.go).
